mapper.sql: id, name_cn, name_en, description_cn, description_en, icon_file_id, lifecycle_status, deployed_version_id, deployed_version_number, app_id, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_cp_flow_t SET name_cn = #{nameCn}, name_en = #{nameEn}, description_cn = #{descriptionCn}, description_en = #{descriptionEn}, icon_file_id = #{iconFileId}, lifecycle_status = #{lifecycleStatus}, deployed_version_id = #{deployedVersionId}, deployed_version_number = #{deployedVersionNumber}, app_id = #{appId}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
